name: Chimera TTT
author: chimera
innovations: K-Projection LoRA (TTT_K_LORA=1): LoRA on K projections with 0.3x LR
summary: K-projection LoRA adapters on top of PR #596's per-document LoRA TTT. Adds LoRA to key projections with conservative 0.3x LR multiplier for more expressive per-document specialization. Results pending re-run (previous results included disallowed min-NLL epoch selection, now removed).
